memberdef.definition: using dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::Base = detail::VirtualResourceRequestBase
memberdef.name: Base

memberdef.definition: using dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::RRP = detail::ResourceRequestPolicy
memberdef.name: RRP

memberdef.type: VirtualResourceHandle< eastl::conditional_t< true, const Res, Res >, is_gpu, true >
memberdef.definition: using dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::HandleType = VirtualResourceHandle<eastl::conditional_t<true, const Res, Res>, is_gpu, true>
memberdef.name: HandleType

memberdef.definition: constexpr bool dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::is_gpu
memberdef.name: is_gpu

memberdef.definition: constexpr bool dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::true
memberdef.name: true

memberdef.definition: friend class detail::VirtualAttachmentRequest
memberdef.name: detail::VirtualAttachmentRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class VirtualResourceRequest
memberdef.name: VirtualResourceRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class VirtualResourceCreationSemiRequest
memberdef.name: VirtualResourceCreationSemiRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class VirtualResourceRegistrationSemiRequest
memberdef.name: VirtualResourceRegistrationSemiRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class DispatchRequest
memberdef.name: DispatchRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class DrawRequest
memberdef.name: DrawRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class VirtualResourceSemiRequest
memberdef.name: VirtualResourceSemiRequest

memberdef.definition: friend class BaseRegistry
memberdef.name: BaseRegistry

memberdef.definition: !true dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::ERROR
memberdef.name: ERROR

briefdescription.para: Clears the resource with the specified clear value on activation (or render pass begin if its applicable).

detaileddescription.para:
This is only applicable to textures.
blob_name
The name of the blob that contains the clear value.
flags
The flags that show how to clear resource

memberdef.definition: !true remove the duplicate ResourceClearFlags dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::flags
memberdef.name: flags

memberdef.definition: dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::VirtualResourceRequest
memberdef.name: VirtualResourceRequest

memberdef.type: constexpr bool true const char *static constexpr RRP
memberdef.definition: static constexpr bool true const char *static constexpr RRP dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::flipPolicy
memberdef.name: flipPolicy

memberdef.definition: static constexpr RRP dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::setPolicy
memberdef.name: setPolicy

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::Optional)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::optional
memberdef.name: optional

briefdescription.para: Makes this request optional. The node will not get disabled if the resource is missing, the handle will return an empty value.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, setPolicy(RRP::HasShaderVarBinding|RRP::HasUsageType)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindToShaderVar
memberdef.name: bindToShaderVar

briefdescription.para: Requests for this resource to be bound to a shader variable with the specified name. The usage stage MUST have been set beforehand and MUST include all shader stages that this shader var will be accessed from within this node.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the shader variable to bind. If not specified, the name of the resource will be used.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindToShaderVar
memberdef.name: bindToShaderVar

briefdescription.para: Requests for a sub-object of a blob to be bound to a shader variable with the specified name.

parameterdescription.para: A function to extract the value to bind from the blob. Can be a pointer-to-member, i.e. &BlobType::field or a (pure) function pointer.
The name of the shader variable to bind. If not specified, the name of the resource will be used.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindAsView
memberdef.name: bindAsView

briefdescription.para: Requests for a matrix-like blob to be bound as the current view matrix.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindAsView
memberdef.name: bindAsView

briefdescription.para: Requests for a matrix-like sub-object of a blob to be bound as the current view matrix.

parameterdescription.para: A function to extract the value to bind from the blob. Can be a pointer-to-member, i.e. &BlobType::field or a (pure) function pointer.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindAsProj
memberdef.name: bindAsProj

briefdescription.para: Requests for a matrix-like blob to be bound as the current projection matrix.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindAsProj
memberdef.name: bindAsProj

briefdescription.para: Requests for a matrix-like sub-object of a blob to be bound as the current projection matrix.

parameterdescription.para: A function to extract the value to bind from the blob. Can be a pointer-to-member, i.e. &BlobType::field or a (pure) function pointer.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindAsVertexBuffer
memberdef.name: bindAsVertexBuffer

briefdescription.para: Requests for a buffer to be bound for the specified vertex stream.

parameterdescription.para: The vertex stream index to bind the buffer to.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy > dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::bindAsIndexBuffer
memberdef.name: bindAsIndexBuffer

briefdescription.para: Requests for a buffer to be bound as current index buffer.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::HasUsageStage)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::atStage
memberdef.name: atStage

briefdescription.para: Must be used when the resource is manually accessed through the handle or bound to a shader var to specify what shader stage this resource will be used at.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::HasUsageType)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::useAs
memberdef.name: useAs

briefdescription.para: Must be used when the resource is manually accessed through the handle to specify how exactly the resource will be used.

memberdef.definition: HandleType dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::handle
memberdef.name: handle

briefdescription.para: Returns a handle that can be used to access the physical resource underlying this virtual one during execution time. Note that the physical resource will change throughout executions and should never be cached by reference. See dafg::VirtualResourceHandle for further details.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::CanSpecifyHistory)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::withHistory
memberdef.name: withHistory

briefdescription.para: Enables history for this GPU resource creation request.

detaileddescription.para:
A history for a virtual resource is a physical resource that contains the data this virtual resource had at the end of the previous frame. See dafg::History for details.
history
Specifies the way in which history should be handled for this resource.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::CanSpecifyHistory)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::withHistory
memberdef.name: withHistory

briefdescription.para: Enables history for this CPU resource creation request.

detaileddescription.para: A history for a virtual resource is a physical resource that contains the data this virtual resource had at the end of the previous frame. See dafg::History for details.

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::HasClearValue)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::clear
memberdef.name: clear

briefdescription.para: Clears the resource with the specified clear value on activation (or render pass begin if its applicable).

detaileddescription.para:
This is only applicable to textures.
clear_value
The value to clear the resource with.
flags
The flags that show how to clear resource

memberdef.definition: VirtualResourceRequest< Res, flipPolicy(RRP::HasClearValue)> dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::clear
memberdef.name: clear

briefdescription.para: Clears the resource with the specified clear value on activation (or render pass begin if its applicable).

detaileddescription.para:
This is only applicable to textures.
blob_name
The name of the blob that contains the clear value.
flags
The flags that show how to clear resource

memberdef.definition: !true remove the duplicate dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::clear
memberdef.name: clear

memberdef.definition: !true remove the duplicate dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::flipPolicy
memberdef.name: flipPolicy

memberdef.definition: !true remove the duplicate ResourceClearFlags dafg::VirtualResourceRequest< Res, policy >::flipPolicy
memberdef.name: flipPolicy

briefdescription.para: Request for a virtual resource known to FG. Should be used to further configure the properties of the request.

detaileddescription.para: The intended usage is auto myTexHandle = registry.readTexture("my_tex") .optional() ... .handle(); Hence methods are only rvalue-callable. Don't try to get smart with these request classes. Don't cache them, don't pass them around a bunch of functions, KISS.

parameterdescription.para: The C++ type representing this resource. BaseTex/Sbuffer for GPU resources, any C++ type for CPU resources.
Static data about this request's structure used for erroring out at compile time if this class is used incorrectly.
